summary: The diff implements REQ-67 and REQ-68 largely as specified. REQ-66 (adding queryClient.invalidateQueries in useActor.ts via a useEffect watching identity changes) is not evidenced in the diff — the constraint says useActor.ts is immutable, but the requirement still mandates the invalidation be implemented somewhere alternative. The diff shows no such alternative implementation. REQ-67 is partially implemented but deviates from the spec: it uses the cached actor from useActor rather than creating a fresh actor via a direct createActor call with the identity. REQ-68 is well-implemented with console.log, isLoading/isFetching guards, and both desktop/mobile nav coverage.

missing_requirements.requirement: After Internet Identity login completes and a new authenticated identity is set, explicitly call queryClient.invalidateQueries targeting ['isCallerAdmin'] and ['actor'] so the admin status check re-runs immediately after login without a page refresh. Use a useEffect watching identity changes from null to non-null. If useActor.ts is immutable, implement this in an alternative non-immutable file.
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the diff of queryClient.invalidateQueries being called in response to identity changes in any file. useActor.ts was listed as immutable and the diff shows no alternative file implementing this invalidation logic. The only queryClient usage in Navbar.tsx is queryClient.clear() on logout, not invalidation on login.

missing_requirements.requirement: Use the authenticated actor obtained via a direct createActor call with the identity rather than relying on the cached actor from useActor.
missing_requirements.reason: The implemented useIsCallerAdmin in useQueries.ts still uses the actor from useActor() rather than creating a fresh actor via createActor with the identity as specified.

hallucinated_features.description: actorFetching guard added to useIsCallerAdmin enabled condition
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec says enabled should be true only when identity is non-null and the actor is created directly from the identity. The added actorFetching dependency from useActor was not specified in REQ-67.

hallucinated_features.description: My Results nav link added to Navbar
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states all other existing navbar links must remain as-is and adding new navigation links is a non-goal. A My Results link with path /results appears in the navLinks array but was not requested.
